recommendations.title: Hulk Vs.
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Animation, Action, Adventure, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Two stories featuring Marvel's anti-hero The Incredible Hulk and his encounters with the X-Man Wolverine and the god known as Thor.

recommendations.title: Planet Hulk
recommendations.overview: When the Hulk's presence on Earth becomes too great a risk, the Illuminati trick him to board a shuttle destined for a planet where he will be able to live in peace, and launch it into space. The Hulk's struggle to escape causes the shuttle to malfun

recommendations.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
recommendations.overview: Years after the end of the original series, David Banner continues his wandering search for a cure for the condition that turns him into the Hulk. He reunites with former colleague Don Blake, unaware of his mystical connection to Thor. When a crimina

recommendations.title: The Death of the Incredible Hulk
recommendations.genres: Action, Drama, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: In his final attempt to free himself from the curse of the Hulk, Dr. David Banner becomes involved in a dangerous international espionage mission that may finally lead to a cure. As forces close in and the stakes rise, Banner faces an ultimate sacrif

recommendations.title: The Trial of the Incredible Hulk
recommendations.genres: Adventure, Fantasy, Drama, Action, Science Fiction, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: Falsely accused of assault, Dr. David Banner is arrested and placed on trial, facing the possibility of a long prison sentence. Blind attorney Matt Murdock takes on his defence, while secretly operating as the vigilante Daredevil. As the courtroom ba

recommendations.title: DC Showcase: Death
recommendations.overview: Vincent, an artist with unresolved inner demons, meets a mysterious girl who helps him come to terms with his creative legacy… and eventual death.

recommendations.title: Justice League: Gods and Monsters
recommendations.genres: Action, Animation, Fantasy, Adventure, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: In an alternate universe, very different versions of DC's Trinity fight against the government after they are framed for an embassy bombing.

recommendations.title: Thor: Tales of Asgard
recommendations.overview: Hungry for adventure, Thor secretly embarks on the journey of a lifetime, joined by his loyal brother Loki, whose budding sorcery equips him with just enough magic to conjure up trouble, along with the Warriors Three - a band of boastful travelers re

recommendations.title: Superman: Red Son
recommendations.overview: Set in the thick of the Cold War, Red Son introduces us to a Superman who landed in the USSR during the 1950s and grows up to become a Soviet symbol that fights for the preservation of Stalin’s brand of communism.

recommendations.title: Teen Titans: The Judas Contract
recommendations.overview: Tara Markov is a girl who has power over earth and stone; she is also more than she seems. Is the newest Teen Titan an ally or a threat? And what are the mercenary Deathstroke's plans for the Titans?
